content.full_text:
April 24, 1991

FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
Attn: Legal Dept.
428 "J" Street, Suite 600
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Sirs:

Under guidelines issued by the FPPC, Does Prop. 73 prevent an elected official from recommending the subject matter of material included in newsletters, which meet the test of mass mailings?

Please confirm you answer in writing.

Most sincerely,

Clair W. Harmony
President
